candidate_control_actions.label: Allowed observed baseline adjustment set from 13/03
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: This set can feed RA/matching/IPW/AIPW lessons as observed baseline adjustment, while unmeasured latent_motivation remains a limitation.

candidate_control_actions.label: Controls for offer before estimating received assistance
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: Offer is part of the assignment and compliance mechanism; adding it changes the causal question.

candidate_control_actions.label: Controls for onboarding completion
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: Completion sits on a directed treatment-to-activation path, so this does not estimate the primary total effect.

candidate_control_actions.label: Keeps only users who opened support chat after offer
candidate_control_actions.population_change: Restricts the cohort to a post-treatment support-chat subgroup caused by both assistance and friction.
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: This filter conditions on a collider and can create association that was not present in the target population.

candidate_control_actions.label: Keeps only complete 30-day telemetry
candidate_control_actions.population_change: Restricts analysis to users with post-treatment complete telemetry, changing the target population after treatment.
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: This is not harmless data cleaning: treatment and activation can both affect telemetry completeness.

candidate_control_actions.label: Feature-rich model with several post-treatment controls
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: Predictive feature soup mixes a mediator, collider and selection variable and is not a causal adjustment set.

candidate_control_actions.label: Leaky model that adjusts for activation outcome
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: The target outcome cannot be used to estimate its own treatment effect.

candidate_control_actions.label: Controls for paid subscription while estimating activation
candidate_control_actions.interpretation: A downstream outcome is not a baseline confounder for the activation estimand.
